They are talking to the researchers while the cursor remains stationary near the meerkat illustration.","confidence":0.9,"interaction_target":"Page content","page_title":"Compare the Market","page_location":"comparethemarket.com.au/travel/compare/v2/q/travel-contact-details","frame_description":"The screen shows a form for personal details on the Compare the Market website."},{"type":"navigate","time_start_ms":39150,"time_end_ms":39800,"description":"The user switches browser tabs from the insurance website to the Lookback session page.","confidence":1.0,"interaction_target":"Browser tab","page_title":"sessions.lookback.io/rooms/dot-baku-6p6","page_location":"sessions.lookback.io/rooms/dot-baku-6p6","frame_description":"The browser tab changes to the Lookback session interface."},{"type":"change_ui_state","time_start_ms":39800,"time_end_ms":40500,"description":"The Lookback session interface loads, displaying the video call participants and a screen-sharing recursion effect.","confidence":0.9,"frame_description":"The Lookback interface is visible with video feeds of the participants."},{"type":"cursor_thrash","time_start_ms":75100,"time_end_ms":78000,"description":"The cursor moves rapidly and erratically across the screen as the user navigates the Lookback interface to end the session.","confidence":0.8,"frame_description":"The cursor jumps between different areas of the Lookback session window."},{"type":"click","time_start_ms":78000,"time_end_ms":78500,"description":"The user clicks the 'Stop sharing' button at the bottom of the screen to conclude the testing session.","confidence":0.9,"interaction_target":"Stop sharing button","frame_description":"The user activates the 'Stop sharing' control in the Lookback interface."}]
